# idsec_cce_azure_identity_params (Data Source)

CCE Azure Identity Params data source, retrieves Azure identity federation parameters for active services.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `identity_params` (Attributes Map) Map of service names to identity parameters (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--identity_params))
- `tenant_id` (String) Azure tenant identifier

<a id="nestedatt--identity_params"></a>
### Nested Schema for `identity_params`

Read-Only:

- `identity_app_audience` (String) Identity application audience
- `identity_app_id` (String) Identity application identifier
- `identity_app_issuer` (String) Identity application issuer
- `identity_user_id` (String) Identity user identifier
